languages.text: "Я вижу, тебе больно. Опусти оружие. Я прикажу снабдить тебя лучшими обезболивающими".

traits.locale_text: "Я вижу, тебе больно. Опусти оружие. Я прикажу снабдить тебя лучшими обезболивающими".

languages.text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."
languages.original_text: "Я вижу, тебе больно. Опусти оружие. Я прикажу снабдить тебя лучшими обезболивающими".

traits.locale_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."
"I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."
"I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."
"I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

languages.text: "Ich sehe, dass Ihr Schmerzen habt. Senkt Eure Waffe. Ich lasse Euch unsere besten Schmerzmittel verabreichen."
languages.original_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe, dass Ihr Schmerzen habt. Senkt Eure Waffe. Ich lasse Euch unsere besten Schmerzmittel verabreichen."

languages.text: « Je vois que vous souffrez. Baissez votre arme, et je demanderais à ce qu'on vous administre les meilleurs analgésiques. »
languages.original_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois que vous souffrez. Baissez votre arme, et je demanderais à ce qu'on vous administre les meilleurs analgésiques. »

languages.text: “我看得出来你很痛苦。放下武器，我让人给你用最好的止痛药。”
languages.original_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

traits.locale_text: “我看得出来你很痛苦。放下武器，我让人给你用最好的止痛药。”

languages.text: «Veo que siente un gran dolor. Baje el arma. Me aseguraré de que recibe los mejores analgésicos disponibles».
languages.original_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

traits.locale_text: «Veo que siente un gran dolor. Baje el arma. Me aseguraré de que recibe los mejores analgésicos disponibles».

languages.text: 「痛がっているのがわかる。武器を下ろせ。最高の鎮痛剤を与えるよう指示する」
languages.original_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

traits.locale_text: 「痛がっているのがわかる。武器を下ろせ。最高の鎮痛剤を与えるよう指示する」

languages.text: "Acı çektiğini görebiliyorum. Silahını indir. Sana mevcut en iyi ağrı kesicilerin verilmesi talimatını vereceğim."
languages.original_text: "I can see you are in pain. Lower your weapon. I will instruct that you be given the best painkillers available."

traits.locale_text: "Acı çektiğini görebiliyorum. Silahını indir. Sana mevcut en iyi ağrı kesicilerin verilmesi talimatını vereceğim."
